posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Mark your calendars! All the events you need to know about can be found here.

We love to host all kinds of digital and in-person events for our community. Here you can stay up to date on all community events including**

  • New features webinars

  • Community support hours

  • AMA (ask me anything) sessions,

  • Behind-the-scenes with monday.com employees

  • And more exclusive community events!

We hope to see you at our community events soon!
